face.structure: well-defined, angular jawline with high cheekbones providing a sculpted look

eyes.shape: sharp almond shape with slightly upturned outer corners
eyes.color: dark chestnut brown with a gradient toward black around the iris
details: subtle dark ring around the iris
light shadowing on the lower eyelid

face.expression: confident with a subtle hint of introspection, occasionally breaking into a half smile

skin.undertone: cool with a slight grayish hue
skin.texture: smooth with minor blemishes typical of teenage skin
skin.rendering_notes: soft matte finish with gentle shading on the cheeks and jaw

hair.color: charcoal black with subtle blue highlights
hair.style: short on the sides with a longer, layered top
hair.flow: straight with a slight tousled effect, sweeping slightly to one side
details: slight wispy fringe falling over the forehead

character.aura: subdued confidence with an enigmatic charm

outfit.design: navy blue with thin pinstripes and a single silver button closure
details: crisp white shirt underneath without a tie
a small lapel pin featuring a minimalist abstract design
outfit.fit: snug around the shoulders, slightly loose at the waist

composition.framing: medium close-up focusing from just below the shoulders to above the head
composition.pose: slightly leaned back with arms crossed casually in front
composition.gesture: head slightly tilted with raised eyebrows, conveying attentive interest

background.color_palette: muted earth tones with soft lighting
background.details: blurred bookshelves filled with books in the background
background.rules: keep distractions minimal to maintain focus on the character's expressions
